title: Ride Together
description: A mod that makes it possible for two players to ride one horse.
body:
# Riding Together

Riding together is a simple mod that permits to ride a horse with a friend 

There is also a few utils features:
- Instant tame in creative mode
- Avoid the horse from moving when saddled

**Requirement:** (no longer required for 26.X) [Architectury API]([https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/architectury-api](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api))


See also : [Doped Horses Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/doped-horses)

Compatible with the great : [Horseman](https://modrinth.com/mod/horseman)

![Duo Ride](https://i.ibb.co/XZJvrNMT/2025-09-28-17-44-12.png)
